compressed_prompt: weird resume for coffee job, two SECTIONs, bullet points
response:
# ☕ RESUME FOR COFFEE PERSON

---

## SECTION ONE: WHY I AM GOOD AT THIS

- Have consumed coffee since age 14, making me basically a scientist
- Can spell "macchiato" without googling it (most days)
- Once made eye contact with a barista and said "you too" when they said "enjoy your drink" — I understand the assignment
- Survived a double shift on 4 hours of sleep using only vibes and an oat milk latte
- Know the difference between a flat white and a latte and will explain it to anyone who asks (and some who don't)
- My handwriting on cups is *mostly* legible
- Have strong opinions about tamping pressure

---

## SECTION TWO: ADDITIONAL QUALIFICATIONS

- Will absolutely judge your order but smile warmly while doing it
- Can identify a decaf person by their energy alone
- Immune to the phrase "can you make it extra hot"
- Once fixed a broken espresso machine using intuition and mild panic
- Comfortable with customers who say "surprise me" (I will not be surprised)
- Available mornings, which is impressive given the circumstances
- Genuinely love the smell of coffee more than most relationships

---

*References available upon request. They will all be caffeinated.*
